title: eriophorum scheuchzeri subsp. medium
intro: Eriophorum scheuchzeri subsp. medium, also known as the Scheuchzer's cotton-grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eriophorum scheuchzeri subsp. medium include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing its roots or rhizomes in hot water to create a tea or using it in combination with other herbs in tinctures or salves.
